title: Ancient Warfare 3
description: A continuation of Ancient Warfare for 2022.
body:
# Ancient Warfare 3

## Why does this mod exist?

This mod is a direct fork of Ancient Warfare 2.4.115 with added changed from the Ancient Warfare 2.5 branch. This project allows the mod to actually be compiled and function on modern systems so that it can be further modified by myself or forked by others.

## Changes from Ancient Warfare 2.4.115

A full list of changes can be found in the change log. At this moment, a majority of changes come from the 2.5 branch of the original mod that was never released.
